goal: has_derivative_at(compose[Real, Real, Real](square_real, pointwise_add[Real, Real](pointwise_mul[Real, Real](constant(c), identity_fn[Real]), constant(b))), x0, (affine(x0) * Real.1 + affine(x0) * Real.1) * c)
